title: Ooak Toothbrush, Tapered V++Max Medium Bristles, 2 Pack - Red
description: Ooak Standard V++ Max Technology Medium - 2 Pack RedOoak Standard V++ Max Technology Light Tapered V++Max bristles offer a unique design that simultaneously cleans teeth and removes plaque along the gum line. Outer bristles are positioned to gently stimulate gums for an overall healthier mouth. Dental Professional Recommended
features: Ergonomic bristles clean teeth and gums simultaneously
Reduces plaque and cleans the gum line
45 Degree outer bristles
BPA Free

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

title: Oral-B 8000 Electric Toothbrush with Bluetooth Connectivity, White
description: Use the Oral-B App to seamlessly pair your Genius 8000 with a smartphone and you're on your way to brushing like your dentist recommends. The Oral-B Genius 8000 comes with Position Detection technology which uses Bluetooth technology, your smartphone, and facial recognition technology to provide you with real-time feedback about your brushing habits. The 360 Smarting with LED lights allows you to personalize your brushing experience with your choice of 12 colors. The Smarting works with the integrated timer and pressure sensor to provide you with visual feedback on brushing time and brushing pressure. Together, they help you ensure you brush for the recommended 2-minutes while making sure you brush with appropriate pressure to protect your gums from over-brushing. The premium Smart Travel Case lets you charge your brush and smartphone (via USB) at the same time while using only one wall plug. The Genius features 6 brushing modes so you can further customize your brushing experience based on your specific oral care goals. This highly advanced brush features a dentist-inspired round head that surrounds and cups each tooth with dynamic oscillating, rotating and pulsating movements to remove up to 500% more plaque than a regular manual toothbrush. Trust in the precision engineering of Braun and the dental expertise of Oral-B, the #1 brand used and recommended by dentists worldwide. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
features: Position Detection to help you know where you've brushed, so you never miss a zone
Multicolor Smarting on electric toothbrush provides coaching on brushing time
Pressure sensor technology slows brush speed to protect gums
Rechargeable with 6 cleaning modes allow you to brush based on your needs
Smart Travel toothbrush case for dual cell phone and brush handle charging

reviews.title: Tb
reviews.text: Stop working after two months. What a waste.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
for a top model priced as such, i was a disappointed in the feature set....no UV system to sterilize the brush head. Travel pack and main stand run on two different power systems...travel pack runs on 100-240v (universal) and main stand only runs on 110v (NA).

Does anyone know the point of the tongue mode being at the very bottom of the mode switch list? i brush my teeth and brush my tongue so the tongue mode should have been immediately after the regular brush mode

a few days use on a single charge. great build. grippy soft handle.

reviews.title: Some new features, brush works well.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is much like my old one, only this one is black. It does have a blue tooth thing that is so-so. It was a little cumbersome to get the app to work, (and had to get a new phone). The interaction between myself, the tooth brush, and the phone seems to be lacking. I envisioned real time brushing animation or something. This just times you through the selected areas. It is nice to get the bushing too hard feature well to know its there, and works. I miss the second speed my old one had this one only has one speed. I like that I can use my phone to help to remind me of my brushing responsibilities. The travel case is a nice feature as well. The design and function of this brush works well as does my old one. I was just expecting something a little more.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Product arrived in time and exactly as presented on amazon

reviews.title: powerful toothbrush but a bit gimmicky
reviews.text:
I upgraded to this toothbrush from a vibrating-head type. The difference in cleaning-power feels dramatic. It has several different speeds for brushing teeth, gums, tongue, etc. By default, the light will blink and the toothbrush pause at certain intervals to ensure you spend enough time brushing different areas. This can be further customized with the Bluetooth unit and application. This is a neat novelty, and may be good for encouraging children to learn to brush correctly. To be honest though, when in a rush in the morning, I am not likely to take the extra step of using a phone app while brushing my teeth, and I also prefer not to take up another plug, as it’s not integrated with the charging base.

Overall I like the toothbrush a lot, but next time around, I would likely get the less expensive model without the phone accessories.

【FAST CHARGING】 The ultrasonic toothbrush is equipped with fast charging cable, which can be discharged and charged instantly. The LED lights on when USB charging is connected, and it only needs to be charged for 3 hours and can be used for 1 week. Safe, fast and convenient, easy to use at home or travel.

【UNIQUE U-SHAPED DESIGN】 Ergonomic U-shaped brush head, suitable for the shape and mechanics of children's teeth structure. 【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODE】Our automatic toothbrush can promote the health of gums and teeth through different functional modes : 1. Strong mode for powerful teeth brushing; 2. Medium mode for comfortable teeth brushing; 3. Massage mode for gum massage.50 secs scientific timing for each brushing, it stops automatically, Parents don’t have to face to face to urge children to brush their teeth.

reviews.title: It came off
reviews.text: My daughter pull off the rubber part that it attached to the metal part. I have no idea if it was supposed to do that. She can still use it but I to help her get it out of her mouth at times. I need to see if I can have it exchanged for a new one. Its a lot easier to get her to brush her teeth she likes it and she is 4

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: My eldest has a difficult time with the sensation of anything against his gums.  This results in nasty plaque.  I was hopeful that this would be a solution but it's not.  Expensive let down.

reviews.title: Worked great for 3 months
reviews.text: Worked great for 3 months. Then stopped working even though it was fully charged.

reviews.title: Good 4 Already Clean Kid Teeth
reviews.text:
Very easy and fun for toddlers who are learning to brush their teeth. Definitely must swish back and forth, for any actual cleaning to take place.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: My kids absolutely love these. The brush their teeth everyday without a fight. I love them they are small perfect for kid hands and super easy to use.

reviews.title: Fake 5 star reviews on here!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:5dfb9184c45053dabbd9b211960ab648]] First of all, there is some fake sketchy reviews on here… there is no way that these crappie silicone toothbrushes will actually brush your teeth and get all your nasty plaque of your teeth.

Second, these aren’t put sealed packaging, there are just shoved in a box and who knows what material they’re made out of? Made in fancy China… no offense to China, I really like them, they just have a bad reputation for cheaply made products that have harmful chemicals in them.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: Great toothpaste!
reviews.text:
I've used the anise and cinnamon flavors many times. I don't like mint toothpaste that overpowers. This one is more subtle, really impressed.

I've used this product for many years. Took a few brushes to get used to the salty baking powder taste, but it's been smooth sailing ever since... And no cavities!

reviews.title: Tooth Powder
reviews.text: This product is the bomb!  Been using it for years and always get compliments on how nice and white my teeth are.  The container seems to last forever so that compensates for the slightly high price for a toothpaste.  Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:43eb444c7fc5734c88e2c00c67e2f0fc]] Ordered these to brush my kids teeth. They help simplify the process of trying with a regular tooth brush at this time. Fits on fingers well. Soft and gentle on gums snd helps get teeth clean. Im satisfied.

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

Our BrushSync technology tracks how long you have been using your Optimal Gum Care brush head and how hard you have been brushing. Your electric toothbrush will beep to inform you when to replace your brush head. The easy-start feature slowly increases the power of the brush as you get used to the Sonicare experience and the SmarTimer encourages a full 2 minute brushing time as recommended by your dental professional. The battery indicator light lets you know when it is time recharge; 2 week battery life. The kit includes 1 ProtectiveClean 5300 handle, 1 Optimal Gum Care brush head, 1 charger, 1 travel case, and 2 extra DiamondClean brush heads. reviews.title: Hate the feeling
reviews.text:
Picked this up alongside an OralB toothbrush to compare and...I don't understand why people like the Sonicare toothbrushes.

I've seen people say that you have to get used to the feeling, but it just feels awful. Not even necessarily the regular use, but if you accidentally touch the plastic to your teeth you get a horrible vibration feeling that shoots through your jaw/entire head. It also feels awful if you touch it on your lips on accident, too.

This alone made me return it in favor of the Oral B.

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

The design includes a curved handle for those hard-to-reach places and a three-level bristle arrangement to massage your gums. And while the bristles are brand new, the handle is made from recycled yogurt cups. The reusable, clear travel case features ventilation holes and a cap to keep your toothbrush clean and dry wherever you take it or store it. reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...
reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

They softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain. Extra Soft Bristles make this toothbrush perfect for those with gum recession, sensitive teeth, exposed roots, implants and braces.
